heading: Omitted
label: 298 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which required Indian agents to submit a census of the Indians at the agency in their annual report, was omitted as obsolete since there have been no Indian agents since 1908. See note set out under .act July 4, 1884, ch. 180, § 923 Stat. 98section 64 of this title
